steps.assistant_text: Fade/slew-limiter, 70.6%->exact. The pre-branch addiu v1,v0,0x124 is the ELSE-ARM'S OWN pointer hoisted with its bc1fl delay-slot load: compare derefs st+0x124 DIRECTLY (no shared local — that colors a1+move), each arm materializes its own v via if(1){v=(float*)((char*)v+K);} — both arms color v1, else's addiu hoists above the bc1fl, then-arm re-materializes in-arm. Distinct float externs D_CD24_dflt/up/dn fold into lwc1 %lo (undefined_syms = linked in-USO offsets 0x384/0x388/0x38C).
